_comment: Software-domain title gate, shared by jobhive + the un-scoped board feeds (builtin-*, simplify-newgrad) via config_store.wanted(). Include-match at a word start on the job TITLE: a role is kept only if it names an actual software domain AND hits no 'exclude' term. These are DOMAIN terms only -- seniority words (intern, new grad, entry level, ...) are deliberately absent so a non-software entry-level/new-grad role (sales, nursing, mechanical eng) is dropped. Fallback only: the live source of truth is the Supabase 'keywords' table.
